caption: A man wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and headphones sits in a room with a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. He sports a distinctive, tall, silver-grey wig that peaks upward. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the lower-left and lower-right corners, on-screen graphics are visible; the left side features a logo with the text "TALK OIL PODCAST," while the right side displays "TALK OIL" in red and white text. The man is captured mid-speech, with his mouth open and his head slightly tilted. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, subtly shifting his facial expression and mouth movements as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
